side_effects.description: Appetite suppression leading to excessive weight loss; user appeared scrawny and others commented on potential illness
GLP-1 suppression effects; user reduced dose from 3mg to 2mg weekly due to suppression being too much

protocol_notes: Purchased 30mg vials assuming 4mg/week dosing after 3 months but only used 2-3mg/week. Combined Reta with overly aggressive diet (one meal a day, near-carnivore). Did not prioritize protein and resistance training during cycle. Started multiple peptides simultaneously making it difficult to isolate side effect causes. First purchase from gray market vendor and was scammed. Spent excessive amounts on initial purchases.
